title: elmerrillia vrieseana
intro: Elmerrillia vrieseana, also known as the Vries' Elmerrillia or Vries' Elmerrillia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Elmerrillia vrieseana is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and sore throat.
